headline: Bing Bong McFlapjack Opens Restaurant Serving Only Breakfast For Dinner
summary: The 'Brinner Bistro' serves pancakes at 8 PM and proudly calls it 'rebellious.'
fullBody: Bing Bong McFlapjack has opened 'The Brinner Bistro,' a restaurant that serves breakfast foods exclusively during dinner hours. 'Why should morning have all the fun?' McFlapjack asked while flipping a pancake at 9 PM. The menu includes 'Midnight Omelettes' and 'After-Dark Waffles.' Customers love the 'forbidden breakfast' concept. McFlapjack is now considering a 'Dessert for Breakfast' pop-up called 'The Morning Sugar Rush.'
